scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n db,api,fe -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev:db" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix app/backend && npm run build --prefix app/frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix app/frontend && npm run lint --prefix app/backend
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix app/backend && npm run test --prefix app/frontend
